description: Illustrative MCP tool sketch for CCP Care Network Lookup. JSON Schema remains the canonical CCP contract.

tools.name: ccp_care_network_lookup_request
tools.title: Request CCP Care Network Lookup
tools.description: Look up one subject actor's relationship, allowed contact channels, action authorizations, or revocation status for one pet and purpose. The server evaluates requester identity, pet identity, subject actor identity, scopes, purpose, active grant, visibility classes, contact permissions, action authority, revocation status, and freshness. Protocol-level denials return a CCP response envelope with status `denied`.
